mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID as "memberId", LOGIN_ID as "loginId", NAME as "name", GENDER as "gender", AGE as "age", ROLE as "role", CREATED_AT as "createdAt", LAST_LOGIN_AT as "lastLoginAt" FROM MEMBER ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT MEMBER_ID as "memberId", LOGIN_ID as "loginId", PASSWORD as "password", NAME as "name", GENDER as "gender", AGE as "age", ROLE as "role", CREATED_AT as "createdAt", LAST_LOGIN_AT as "lastLoginAt" FROM MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
